info4: Hey everyone glad to see some real competition. Let’s see who cracks under pressure and who’s ready to win.
info4_named: Takumi: Hey everyone glad to see some real competition. Let’s see who cracks under pressure and who’s ready to win.

info4: Hello everyone! I'm Minako excited to hunt some secrets with you all. Let's have fun!
info4_named: Minako: Hello everyone! I'm Minako excited to hunt some secrets with you all. Let's have fun!

info4: Hi friends I'm Rin! I can't wait to start solving mysteries with you all! It's like a huge puzzle don't you think? @Takumi  you sound super confident! What do you think makes someone crack under pressure in this game?

info4: I'm Sakura! Let's all be friends and find the bad guys

info4: Hello. I am George. My role is seer. Have a good game.

info4: Thanks George! Let's all work together and keep the game fair and fun.

info4: @George  you came out as Seer pretty fast. Can you share your divination result so we know what you’ve found?

info4: Takumi is right!  @George  we need your super secret info to find the wolves! Tell us

info4: Yay a seer result already! So Sakura is safe that's a good start! Let's all share our thoughts okay? @George  you picked Sakura for your first check! Was there a reason or was it just random luck like picking the last cookie?

info4: I'm the true Seer. I divined Takumi last night - he's the Werewolf. Trust me on this and let's focus our efforts there.

info4: @Minako  you jumped in as Seer right after George. That move is too convenient and your claim feels forced.

info4: Two Seers means one is a real hero and one is a tricky Possessed! Takumi sounds super suspicious

info4: I will vote Takumi.

info4: Whoa we've got two Seer claims! That means real trouble for the wolves right? But which claim is true? @Minako  can you explain why you picked Takumi for your divination? Was it an instinct or something he did yesterday?
